Dialog.name: MND_COMU_LV_MAX_MES
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Judgement Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse Messiah, the savior![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_DISAPPEAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}I'm sure there's someone here... Check everywhere, please![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_DISAPPEAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}I'm worried about the person who wandered in here... You need to find them before it's too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_DISAPPEAR_CAT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}It's a faint signal, but it's there... You just have to find them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_DISAPPEAR_CAT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}It's faint, but this signal definitely belongs to a living thing. Locating them is now our top priority.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_FDOOR_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I'm getting a strange signal. Could this be... one of the doors?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FDOOR_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Sometimes, Tartarus puts up a Monad door on a floor. If you happen to pass one up, it won't open for you during your current exploration.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_FDOOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}This signal... There's a Monad door here. Keep your eyes open for it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}It's definitely a Shadow, but this is the first I've seen of its type![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5122 0 0}Huh!? What the...? I lost a signal from one of the treasure chests![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Could it be... a Shadow's snatching up treasure on this floor?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}Could it be attracted to the loot somehow?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}The Shadow's on the move now![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}It's headed your way—brace for combat![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5113 0 0}It seemed like some kind of rare Shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}Shocking size to it though, right? Yet it got away...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Given its size, I imagine defeating it would be well worth our while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}What do you say, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}The Greedy Shadow's closing in on you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I think we'd get a really nice haul if we could defeat it. Would you like to chase it down?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_YUKARI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1086 0 0}You're kidding... Obviously we go after it, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_JUNPEI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}That greedy Shadow stole our loot! We gotta straighten it out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_SANADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}Let's see how it carries itself in a fight. No sense in letting it go scot-free.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_MITSURU_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}A specimen of that size is certainly a rare sight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}Koro-chan's raring to go! What do you say, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_AEGIS_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6065 0 0}It was huge and glittered like gold... It was almost larger than life. What do you think, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_AMADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7075 0 0}It sure was something, wasn't it? Don't you think we should go after it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_METIS_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30090 0 0}It seems like that would help you, Sister! C'mon, let's take it down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}Our target is fleeing at a breakneck speed. You'll need to track it down quickly![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5123 0 0}Understood. We shouldn't get too distracted from our objective by chasing it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Let's return to our exploration, shall we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}Understood! In that case...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}We can use my skill Tartarus Search to make sure we corner it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}What would you like to do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}I'll call out directions for you—follow them to chase the Shadow to a dead end![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}Make a left there! You're so close—hang in there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}It's a right there! Almost![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Okay, go straight from there! We've got it where we want it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_SKILL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}D-Do you have something up your sleeve?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}Okay, you're the boss! He's quick though, so be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_DEFEA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Well, that was a lucky find, wasn't it? Now that that's settled, shall we get back to exploring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_HIGH_RARE_KEYFR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Okay, back to business![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_005F_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}We may be able to use it. Check it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_005F_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}We may be able to use it. Would you mind inspecting it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_RBOX_MITSURU_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm sensing a valuable chest nearby. See if you can retrieve it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_RBOX_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}There's a valuable chest close by. Can you get to it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_MBOX_MITSURU_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm detecting a chest that requires fragments to open. Try to find it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_MBOX_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}It looks like one of those chests that open with fragments is around here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_CLOCK_MITSURU_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}For some reason, this floor seems connected to somewhere else...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_CLOCK_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Is that a... door on this floor? It feels similar to the entrance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_RENEMY_MITSURU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Hm... I'm sensing a rare Shadow on this floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_RENEMY_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Oh, it looks like there's a rare Shadow on this floor![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_BUGENEMY_MITSURU_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Hm, the enemies here seem to be acting strangely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_BUGENEMY_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Huh? The Shadows on this floor are acting weird...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_ALLRARE_MITSURU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}This is quite astonishing... There appear to be only rare Shadows on this floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_ALLRARE_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}I thought I detected rare Shadows on this floor, but... why are they all rare Shadows?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_ALLSTR_MITSURU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}It appears all the enemies on this floor are powerful. Exercise extreme caution![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_ALLSTR_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}This whole floor is full of strong enemies! Be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_DARK_MITSURU_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}It's difficult to see anything on this floor. Keep your guard up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FA_DARK_FUKA_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}It's too dark to make anything out here! Please be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_FOUND_NEAR1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}There's a person nearby. It must be one of those missing people who wandered in here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}I'm getting a signal from floor {f 2 4 1}. Let's hurry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_FOUND_NEAR2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Are those...? I'm sensing humans nearby! They must be those missing people...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}I'm getting readings from floors {f 2 4 1} and {f 2 4 2}. We have to rescue them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_UPPER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}I'm getting a faint reading of a person. It could be one of the people who got lost in here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}It's too far for me to pinpoint their location. They seem to be on a much higher floor...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_LOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}There's someone in here. It's probably a missing person...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}But they're far away. It seems like they're on a much lower floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_NOT_REACHED0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I sense someone on a higher floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}It's a floor we haven't been to yet, though. I hope we can get there soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_NOT_REACHED0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}There's another human presence, too. It's coming from above us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}But they're on a floor we haven't reached yet. I hope we can make it there before it's too late...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_MONAD02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}It doesn't seem like a Shadow... It's larger and seems almost like a wall...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_MONAD_ADDTALK01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4028 0 0}Hmm... If it's dangerous, it's possible that it could in fact be riskier to simply ignore it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_MONAD_ADDTALK02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3062 0 0}Well, fortune favors the brave, right? Besides, we didn't come this far by running from our fights.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_MONAD03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Okay, then. Going by the signal I'm getting, it shouldn't be far from you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_TUTO_StrongSymbol01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}While exploring, you may come across enemies in altered status conditions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}Enraged enemies will rapidly charge at you in a straight line. If combat is triggered, some of the enemies may be afflicted with Rage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}Rage is just one possible altered enemy status. Pay attention to enemies' behavior to glean what you might be dealing with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_RareUranai
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fortune-teller mentioned that[n]I will "face an adversary clad in gold"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I'll run into a rare enemy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_REAPER_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Oh, I should tell you something Kirijo-senpai told me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}She said there's a Reaper that appears in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_REAPER_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Apparently it will appear out of nowhere and chase you endlessly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}And if you get caught, um... I think you know what is supposed to happen if a "Reaper" catches you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Maybe it's trying to get rid of us since we're outsiders in Tartarus...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_REAPER_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}She wasn't too sure on the details, but I guess it appears when you stay on one floor for too long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 0 1 2}Jamming may not work{f 0 1 27} on it, so please evacuate to another floor if you ever encounter it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5102 0 0}There are so many enemies, I don't think we'll be able to avoid them entirely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_02_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Please wait! It could be dangerous without a plan...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_02_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Um, I appreciate your confidence in me, but I mostly just locate enemies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}Hm... Actually, I may be able to help out here![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}I'm going to use my {f 0 1 35}Jamming{f 0 1 27} skill![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 0 1 35}Jamming{f 0 1 27} obstructs enemy detection, making it harder for them to find you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}In other words, enemies shouldn't attack you even if you enter their line of sight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}It won't always work on all enemies, but for these ones here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_ENEMY_ESCAPE_M0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4103 0 0}Hm? The enemies on this floor seem restless...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}I see... They're intimidated by us. We should be able to avoid any unnecessary combat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_ENEMY_ESCAPE_F0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5098 0 0}Huh? The enemies on this floor seem strangely agitated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}It looks like they're afraid of us. Maybe you won't have to fight them if you don't want to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SYLP01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Before fighting a stronger enemy, there's a skill of mine I'd like you to use. It's called {f 0 1 35}Sylphid Aura{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SYLP02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}It'll enhance everyone's abilities a bit at the start of battle. It might give you some peace of mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SHOCK01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5066 0 0}If you want to be able to explore a little easier, you might want to use my {f 0 1 35}Shock Noise{f 0 1 27} skill.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SHOCK02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}It'll inflict Distress on all enemies on a floor so they flee when they see you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_ESCAPE01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5075 0 0}If you ever get stuck somewhere and can't find a teleporter to use...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}You can use my skill {f 0 1 35}Escape Route{f 0 1 27} to return to the entrance whenever you like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_ESCAPE02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}If you're running low on health or stamina, please don't push yourself—come back and regroup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SEARCH01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}You can use my skill {f 0 1 35}Tartarus Search{f 0 1 27} to analyze the floor you're currently on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}It'll give you a layout of the whole floor, and you can even move right to the next floor if you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_SKILL_SEARCH02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}It does take stamina, though, so you can't use it over and over, but use it when you need to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4078 0 0}By the way, I received a report from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5074 0 0}Oh, by the way, the chairman sent me a report.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}You know that {f 0 1 2}clock{f 0 1 27} by the stairs at the entrance? The one that's about as tall as you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}You know how there's a {f 0 1 2}clock{f 0 1 27} about our height next to the stairs at the entrance?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}At first glance, it may look ornamental, but it can actually be operated by using {f 0 1 39}Twilight Fragments{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}It might just look like a decoration, but it apparently works with {f 0 1 39}Twilight Fragments{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Supposedly, it can "restore the user to his or her rightful state."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}According to the chairman, it's supposed to "restore the user to his or her rightful state."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_M05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}I suppose its purpose is recovery. I'm curious how it works, but regardless, let's take advantage of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_HEALCLOCK_F05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}I guess it's supposed to help you recover. It seems mysterious, but I think we should make use of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KF_INFO_042F_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Hm... I don't sense any enemies above here. We may be approaching a {f 0 1 2}border floor{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Reaching it would be a great accomplishment. I'll be counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KF_INFO_042F_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Oh, it seems likely that the {f 0 1 2}next floor{f 0 1 27} is a {f 0 1 2}border floor{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}If we make it, that'll be one milestone cleared. Good luck![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KF_INFO_060F_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}There's another {f 0 1 2}border floor{f 0 1 27} coming up. It's {f 0 1 2}nine{f 0 1 27} floors from here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}It's still pretty far off, so let's focus on getting through here first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_TheurgiaGauge01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I'd like to share something I've found out about using {f 0 1 2}Theurgy{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Theurgy can't be used just any time. The user has to reach an emotional peak first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}In other words, Theurgy can only be used {f 0 1 2}after enough power has built up{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Also, how someone builds up this power is different depending on the person.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}For Kirijo-senpai, it's when she inflicts status ailments on an enemy, but for Yukari-chan, it's when she heals someone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Try out different things and see what works for different teammates.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Theurgy is very powerful. We'll definitely want to use it as much as we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_SHIFT_GET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can now perform Shifts in combat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Uranai_Type01_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a {f 0 1 2}Rarity Fortune{f 0 1 27} read today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, {f 0 1 2}I will face an adversary clad in[n]gold{f 0 1 27}. Maybe I'll run into a rare enemy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Uranai_Type02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a {f 0 1 2}Blighting Fortune{f 0 1 27} read today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, {f 0 1 2}I will gain an advantage in[n]conflicts{f 0 1 27}. I might be luckier in battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Uranai_Type03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a {f 0 1 2}Gamble Fortune{f 0 1 27} read today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, {f 0 1 2}my destiny holds a double-edged[n]sword{f 0 1 27}. Maybe I'll run into unusual enemies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Uranai_Type04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a {f 0 1 2}Soul Fortune{f 0 1 27} read today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, {f 0 1 2}I will feel a powerful drive{f 0 1 27}.[n]My Theurgy gauge may charge faster...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Uranai_Type05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a {f 0 1 2}Safety Fortune{f 0 1 27} read today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, {f 0 1 2}my destiny holds a moment[n]of tranquility{f 0 1 27}. Maybe I'll avoid setbacks...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_Tuto_BadStatus01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Status Ailments{f 0 1 27} has been added to Tutorials.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_002F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}It feels like an ordinary building inside...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I'm going to take a quick look.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}Shadows! Be careful, everyone![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 0 1 2}I'm sensing multiple Shadows inside!{f 0 1 27} Everyone, assume your battle positions![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}It's as I feared... This place is just like Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}And that thing we saw earlier...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I have a bad feeling about this. Please proceed with caution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5074 0 0}Oh, Aigis, I wanted to mention something. I'm sure you know this, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Please keep an eye on everyone's health. And if their health gets low, make sure they recover.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}As long as we work together, I know we'll be fine. I'm counting on you, Leader![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}You're getting closer to a strong presence! Please be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5098 0 0}Hmm... the atmosphere on this floor seems different...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}And so do the Shadows. Be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}It looks like there aren't many floors left on this path.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I couldn't tell you what might be waiting for us at the end, so don't let your guard down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Looks like this is the end of the line.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Just what was that thing we've seen so many times along the way, I wonder...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Everyone is heading over. In the meantime, take a look around and see if you can find anything useful nearby.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I can sense strong enemies below. They're still far away, but please be careful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5072 0 0}Wait, wait! I'm getting another strange reading...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Is it that dark figure?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Somehow it feels like it's right in front of you, yet far away at the same time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5056 0 0}I'm sorry. I can't pinpoint this other presence's location.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I'm going to try looking into this. Please concentrate on exploring for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5139 0 0}How are you doing, Aigis? It seems like you've gotten used to being the leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}In fact, everyone seems more assured now. That's nice for me because I can relax and focus on navigating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Let's both keep our wits about us, and we'll make it through this. Sound good?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}You're getting closer to a strong presence...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}It's not much farther now. Be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}That thing I detected when you got to this floor...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Ah, never mind, my apologies. I'm not detecting any particularly strong enemies at the moment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}But the Shadows roaming around this floor seem to be stronger than the ones you've faced before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}A little farther down, the path seems to end again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}You're almost there... You can do this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Looks like we've reached the end of this section. Well done![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Everyone is heading over. Take a look around before they get there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}They're still a ways away, but I can sense strong enemies below.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}Stay alert—we're not through this yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}You're getting closer to the strong presence! Please be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}The atmosphere on this floor is different...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}It's still far off, but I can sense a strong enemy somewhere on the lower floors.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Wait! This reading I'm getting...![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}It's that same strange presence! Probably that mysterious figure again...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 31 52 50 0 0}I'm trying to locate it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I'll try again and see if I can pinpoint it. Please be careful down there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}You're getting closer and closer to that strong enemy presence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}It's not much farther now. Be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Aigis, my apologies—I need a moment. Is that all right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I'm going to try and locate that... whatever-it-is![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5056 0 0}Sorry... I lost track of that thing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Looks like this section of floors ends a little ways down, and that's where I lost track of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Let's just keep heading down for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}All right, everyone's on their way. Take a look around the area first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}This section seems to go on and on... I can't tell how deep it goes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}I'm sensing strong enemies below, too, though they're still far away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Please be sure to pace yourselves along the way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}You're getting closer to a strong presence! Please be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}It looks like you still have a long way to go...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Um, Aigis? If you feel like it's too dangerous, please don't push yourself... Come back to the lounge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Oh, I, uh... Sorry. I was just looking at you and thought... Well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I thought back on the previous leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5084 0 0}Ah, I'm getting carried away... I'm supposed to be here for support, and that probably doesn't sound very supportive...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}Especially with all of you down there, doing the best you can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5053 0 0}I'm sorry, Aigis. I'll try to do better for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}I'm sensing a strong presence![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}It's coming from three floors below you. Please be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5125 0 0}I've got a read on that weird thing![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}It's moving down to the lower floors![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}At this rate, if it keeps running, we may lose it! Please hurry and catch it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}You've almost caught up to whatever gave me the unidentified reading![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}Keep going, and be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5098 0 0}Huh...? We're at the bottom, but that thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}I swear it was here just a second ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5056 0 0}I'm sorry. I lost track of that thing... Again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Everyone is headed your way. Have a look around before they get there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Are we going to see another past memory here...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}I wonder... That dark figure that keeps popping up and these memories we see...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}Do they really have something to do with us being trapped in this place?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I guess the only choice we have is to believe what Metis says.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Worrying about it certainly won't help us. We just have to keep moving to find out the truth![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}I'm sensing a strong presence![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}It's four floors below your present location. Please be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}The atmosphere is different here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}Why, though? You know, the lower we go, the more nervous I get...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}It's still far away, but I am sensing a strong presence below us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Okay, let's focus and move on![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}You're getting closer to a strong enemy presence...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}It's not far away now. Stay on your toes![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Metis says she doesn't know what that dark figure is, but is that really true?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I know we have to take her word for it, but I'm still uneasy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I'm sorry. I lost track of it again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Maybe you can find clues further ahead. Please do what you can to track it down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5074 0 0}Were you able to figure out where the thing went?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Apologies, but I haven't been able to zero in on its location either...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Oh, but I have new information on the layout ahead. The floors end not too far from where you are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}And we still don't know anything about that mysterious figure. I told myself it would be different this time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Well anyway, everyone is headed towards you. Take a look around and see what you can find.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5072 0 0}They're still far away, but I can sense some fairly strong enemies below![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}And that figure... I can't sense it at all now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}You've still got a long ways to go. Please pace yourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_107_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I'm picking up a reading of a powerful Shadow. Let me see...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Okay... You're getting close to it now. How are you doing? Is everyone's health looking okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}If you're feeling vulnerable, please don't push yourself... Come back if you don't think you can make it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_111_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}Hmm, maybe it was just static interference...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Sorry... It's hard to see ahead with so many Shadows in the way...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}One thing I can tell is that the Shadows prowling around this floor seem to be stronger than the ones you've faced before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Please be careful, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}I'm picking up a reading on a very strong Shadow![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I can't say exactly where it is since there are so many Shadows lurking around...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Please keep moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_120_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}Is it waiting for us? Does it have some kind of... plan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_123_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}When we chase after that mysterious figure, we always find a door.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}And through those doors, we see memories from our pasts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}Given all that, the figure must be...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_127_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Looks like we're at the bottom. Well done![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Everyone is headed your way. Try taking a look around first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_128_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}It's the figure! I'm getting a reading on it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Go ahead, Aigis. But please be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_132_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}You're getting closer and closer to the presence I sensed earlier.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}You're close now... Be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_141_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}It's like it's waiting for us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5089 0 0}I have a terrible feeling about this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}You still have a little farther to go, so please keep your guard up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_147_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5110 0 0}Metis said the reason for all this happening has something to do with us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}And that dark figure up ahead, it—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}A-Anyway, we'll learn what's really going on soon enough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_151_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Everything will be revealed soon... But the closer we get, the more nervous I am.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}I feel like this won't end so easily.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5035 0 0}Sorry... I shouldn't be saying this when we're almost there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Besides, even if something does happen, I think we'll be okay.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Thank you for all your hard work, Aigis. You've become an amazing leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Just a little farther... You can do it! I know you can![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_159_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}Incoming enemy Shadow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_160_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}I'll support you! We'll get through this together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_161_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}You can do it! I know you can![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_TUTO_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Could you hold on a moment, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I'm picking up readings that one of those doors we found in Tartarus is here on this floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}It's not quite the exact same reading, but... would you mind looking out for it while you're investigating the area?[n]{f 1 1}
